content.en:
In the following days, Ye Tian took on one task after another, all of which were tasks that took little time.

Fortunately, there are quite a few tasks suitable for the Eightfold Ancestor, and Ye Tian's efficiency is high enough, so he has more and more points on his body.

After a long time, Ye Tian has accumulated tens of millions of points.

"That's enough points! I don't have 10 million points to comprehend the true Immeasurable Path!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he used the quota given to him by the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor and went to the Changbai Mountain.

Changbai Mountain is a white mountain with a special golden glow, located in a special secret place in the Nine-Story Building.

But in fact, Changbai Mountain is not the peak born in that secret place, but from the primordial ancient sea.

A long time ago, a protracted battle broke out between the Silent Black Sea forces such as the Nine-Layer Building and the Primordial Ancient Sea, and the Nine-Folded Building snatched this Evergreen Mountain from a powerful tribal territory of the Primordial Ancient Sea, brought it back directly, and placed it in that secret place, forming such a treasure land.

And Changbai Mountain is also a treasure land that is easy to consume, so the number of places is limited for a long time, otherwise Changbai Mountain would have been scrapped a long time ago and became an ordinary treasure mountain.

Ye Tian has a quota, so he is directly allowed to enter the Changbai Mountain.

When Ye Tian came in, it really shocked the few dozen Dao Ancestors who were still cultivating in the Evergreen Mountain.

"Who is this little guy, he actually came in at this time!"

"Strange, the Eternal Platinum Mountain is blocked, and you are not allowed to come in again during this period, this guy can't be the heir of a certain Ninefold Origin Ancestor Peak Dao Ancestor, right?"

"I have a clone left in the outside world, but I have heard of this Dao Ancestor, his name is Endless Dao Ancestor, he is a very demonic Dao Ancestor, he grows very fast, and now he has only broken through the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and he has comprehended the Infinite Dao Prototype! Moreover, it is said that when he was a half-step Sevenfold Ancestor, his life level was very likely to reach 9.9!"

"The life level of the half-step sevenfold ancestor has reached 9.9, it is terrifying, we have not had such a demon in the nine-fold building for a long time, and it didn't take long to become the eightfold ancestor to comprehend the prototype of the immeasurable path, this proper embryo of the invincible person of the nine-fold ancestor!"

"If it's really so demonic, then it's nothing to give a place to enter the Evergreen Mountain!"

"I still think it's a bit outrageous, for so many years, the Nine-Story Building has hardly made an exception for the Dao Ancestor under his command, this is the first time I know to make an exception!"

"Let's practice well, we won't be here for long, if we can't comprehend the immeasurable path, it will be a bit embarrassing!"

Immediately, these Dao Ancestors practiced with peace of mind one by one.

After Ye Tian came to Changbai Mountain, after saying a simple hello to the Dao Ancestor here, he also began to practice and comprehend the rudiments of the Immeasurable Dao.

As soon as he came to his senses, Ye Tian felt that this place was different from the red peak.

"This, what a terrifying effect!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He finally understood now why the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor said that the Red Mountain Peak was not very attractive to many Dao Ancestors who had comprehended the rudiments of the Immeasurable Dao.

It is only the Dao Ancestors who have just comprehended the rudimentary form of the Immeasurable Dao that they will go there to attain enlightenment, while the Dao Ancestors who have a higher realm of the Infinite Dao Rudimentary Realm will not look down on it at all.

It's really terrifying that the effect of other treasures is terrifying!

It was also because Ye Tian's speed of comprehending the prototype of the Infinite Dao was too fast, so he would feel that the red mountain peak was not bad.

"If the red peaks are compared to the Changbai Mountain, one is 1, the other is 10, or even 20 or 30!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In such an environment, Ye Tian's speed of comprehending the rudiments of the Immeasurable Dao would be very fast.

At this time, Ye Tian felt that before the ten million points were consumed, one hundred percent of the Infinite Dao rudiments could be completely raised to the level of the Infinite Dao.

Years passed, and after only ten billion years of the Origin Domain Era, Ye Tian's Infinite Dao prototype finally made a small breakthrough again.

The prototype of the immeasurable path has taken shape!

At this point, Ye Tian was very close to comprehending the true Immeasurable Dao.

"At most, one hundred billion Origin Realm Era, I should be able to comprehend the true Infinite Dao Rudiment. Now, I can still practice here for a trillion years of the Primordial Era!"

Ye Tian was full of confidence at the moment and continued to practice hard.

On this day, a half-step ninefold ancestor left the Evergreen Mountain because his points had been exhausted and he had not comprehended the true Immeasurable Path.

This kind of half-step nine-fold ancestor belongs to the ordinary half-step nine-fold ancestor, and it is not as good as the nine-fold ancestor who has comprehended the true immeasurable path.

In the Nine-Fold Building, there are not many such half-step Ninefold Ancestors, who spent countless years accumulating points, and then luckily waited for the quota to enter the Everlasting Platinum Mountain, trying to comprehend the Immeasurable Dao, but the result was still unsuccessful.

It was precisely because those eightfold primordial ancestors and half-step ninefold primordial ancestors were relatively ordinary that it seemed that Ye Tian was becoming more and more demonic, and the Ten Dao Mountains wanted to kill him.

If the Ten Dao Mountains knew Ye Tian's current progress speed, I am afraid that even the Nine Primordial Ancestors would assassinate him!

The years passed.

Five tens of billions of Primordial Eras!

Six Billion Primordial Eras!

Seven tens of billions of Primordial Eras!

Eight Billion Primordial Eras!

In fact, at this point, Ye Tian had already reached the extreme of the prototype of the Infinite Dao, and he was only one last qualitative change away from comprehending the true Infinite Dao, and this qualitative change needed more time to make a breakthrough in transformation.

Finally, on this day of the 112 billion Origin Domain Era, Ye Tian's Infinite Dao Prototype completely broke through the shackles and completed the final transformation.

Rumble!!!!

The immeasurable aura erupted from Ye Tian's body and spread throughout the Evergreen Mountain.

At this moment, the other Dao Ancestors were shocked and couldn't believe it.

"What, the Endless Dao Ancestor comprehended the Infinite Dao !! !!! so quickly"

"What kind of demon is this, we have been practicing for so long, and we still haven't broken through, he just came in more than 100 billion Origin Domain Eras, and he broke through?"

"I finally know why the Nine-Story Building made an exception for this Endless Dao Ancestor, if this kind of demon doesn't make an exception, there will be no Dao Ancestor qualifications!"

......

"Finally comprehend the Immeasurable Dao, turn around and stabilize it, and then combine the Immeasurable Dao with the Immeasurable Will, and you can form the Immeasurable Dao Domain!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this moment, an extremely terrifying aura descended, and it was a peak powerhouse of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor who was no less than or even surpassed the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor.

Wow!!!!

One Dao Ancestor after another looked at this Ninefold Primordial Ancestor who had suddenly descended here.

"I've seen Dongchen Daozu!"

Ye Tian and the other Dao Ancestors said respectfully one by one.

Dongchen Dao Ancestor is a Ninefold Origin Ancestor who is more famous than the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor, and he is one of the nine strongest people in the Nine-Story Building.

And the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor does not have this name, which shows the terrifying power of the Dongchen Dao Ancestor!
